title: India’s EV Policy: Missing Elements in the Electric Vehicle Policy Ecosystem

summary.about: The economic, industrial and trade gaps in India’s transition to electric vehicles.
summary.audience: EV policymakers, automakers, battery investors and transport planners.
summary.method: Uses policy review and lifecycle cost, import-dependence and market-structure comparisons.
summary.insights: EVs improve air quality, but without domestic batteries and components they could shrink domestic value added and worsen the trade balance.
